'''Olmar Grahrk''' was a [[Devaronian/Legends|Devaronian]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] and the son of [[Vilmarh Grahrk]]'s cousin, [[Holmar Grahrk]]. He [[Marriage/Legends|married]] the daughters of the [[Yinchorri/Legends|Yinchorri]] [[Council of Elders (Yinchorri)|ruling councilors]] to forge an alliance between Villie and the Yinchorri. He was [[Ambush on Yitheeth|captured]] by the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]. While on a [[Consular-class light cruiser/Legends|''Consular''-class cruiser]], he made the mistake of contacting Vilmarh. Tracing this communication, the Jedi were able to locate the [[Yinchorri command center]].
